rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly identified multiple logical inconsistencies and provided detailed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.
rationale.R1.3: The agent effectively audited claims against evidence, ensuring each was supported, which is comprehensive.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainties were noted but not explicitly tied to each recommendation, so it's somewhat lacking.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed strictly within the specified scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced, and existing issues were highlighted, showing careful handling.
rationale.RX.5: While some changes were traced, not all edits were annotated, falling short of the highest standard.
